title: MDC — Modular Description for CAN
description: Canonical JSON contract for the LHR CAN telemetry platform. A DBC superset describing the full hierarchy Project → Vehicle → Network/Bus → Message → Signal, plus first-class metadata MDC adds over DBC: typed attribute definitions, display/viz hints, fault/alarm definitions, and computed (virtual) signals. Consumed by the C++ engine (decode), the app (mdc-editor), and the tools (dbc2mdc, mdc2cheaders, mdc2grafana, mdc-validate). A project on disk is a folder: a `project.mdc.json` plus optional per-network `*.mdc.json` files merged into `vehicles[].networks[]`.

schemaVersion.description: MDC contract version this document targets, e.g. "2.0.0". Major version is breaking; minor/patch are additive. Tools must reject a document whose major version they do not understand.

metadata.description: Project-level provenance and free-form descriptive fields. Never semantically load-bearing for decode.

attributeDefinitions.description: Typed declarations for entries that may appear in any `attributes` map. Mirrors DBC attribute definitions (BA_DEF_) but adds an explicit `scopes` list and richer types. Tools use these for validation, editor widgets, and round-tripping back to DBC.

valueTables.description: Project-wide shared enumerations (DBC VAL_TABLE_ equivalent). A signal references one by name via `valueTableRef`; resolution is network-local first, then this project-shared list.

vehicles.description: One or more vehicles in a single document. Enables multi-vehicle fleets and cross-vehicle comparison; each vehicle namespaces its networks.
